tweets.text:
Remove them before they do something like this.

HOW MANY ARE TOO MANY?   

Did  you ever hear about Detective Davis’s  preventable death?  Of course not, that’s why I do this.

I’ve  now posted the deaths of 1,217 people killed or allegedly killed by an illegal.  There have been 1000’s of these preventable deaths over the years but MSM doesn’t report them because it doesn’t fit their narrative 

Another illegal convicted,  deported and was then able to return & kill Michael.  Look at how many of the 1,217 preventable deaths I’ve posted were committed by an illegal that was previously arrested and/or deported.

Open borders = preventable deaths.  To Democrats they’re just collateral damage.

Please repost so Michael isn’t forgotten and inform people of his preventable death.

 I’m not selling anything, I’m not writing a book, making a documentary, etc.  There’s nothing in this for me.  I see what’s happening to our country and I’m trying to do something about it.  I ask you to repost  because MSM  doesn’t report these preventable deaths and people should know about them.

I post a photo of the victim so you can see that these preventable deaths happened to real people, to real children and families that had their lives taken from them by someone that was illegally in our country.

@JohnKobyltRadio
